query: Find 10 buildings in Drammen municipality that intersect 200-year flood zones, sorted by distance to the nearest quick-clay hazard zone ascending.

1.description: retrieve Drammen municipality geometry and kommunenummer

2.description: retrieve 200-year flood zones filtered by municipality geometry

5.description: retrieve quick-clay hazard zones filtered by municipality geometry

6.description: calculate distance from each flood-affected building to the nearest quick-clay hazard zone

7.description: collapse to one row per building with minimum distance to quick-clay hazard zone

8.description: sort buildings by distance to quick-clay hazard zone ascending
